'''gahaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sialidosis|sialidosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sialidosis|sialidosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gahaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhæjæth|gæhæjæth]] || [[word:gæhæjæj|gæhæjæj]] || [[word:gæhæjæsh|gæhæjæsh]] || [[word:gæhæjæ|gæhæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahahajath|gahahajath]] || [[word:gahahajaj|gahahajaj]] || [[word:gahahajash|gahahajash]] || [[word:gahahaja|gahahaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahajath|gahajath]] || [[word:gahajaj|gahajaj]] || [[word:gahajash|gahajash]] || [[word:gahaja|gahaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahafjafth|gahafjafth]] || [[word:gahafjafj|gahafjafj]] || [[word:gahafjafsh|gahafjafsh]] || [[word:gahafjaf|gahafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahajatha|gahajatha]] || [[word:gahajaja|gahajaja]] || [[word:gahajasha|gahajasha]] || [[word:gahajaka|gahajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahajath|gahajath]] || [[word:gahajaj|gahajaj]] || [[word:gahajash|gahajash]] || [[word:gahaja|gahaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahajathal|gahajathal]] || [[word:gahajajal|gahajajal]] || [[word:gahajashal|gahajashal]] || [[word:gahajakal|gahajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahajaathatha|gahajaathatha]] || [[word:gahajaajaja|gahajaajaja]] || [[word:gahajaashasha|gahajaashasha]] || [[word:gahajaaka|gahajaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahajathan|gahajathan]] || [[word:gahajajan|gahajajan]] || [[word:gahajashan|gahajashan]] || [[word:gahajakan|gahajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahajathaoro|gahajathaoro]] || [[word:gahajajaoro|gahajajaoro]] || [[word:gahajashaoro|gahajashaoro]] || [[word:gahajakaoro|gahajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
